Nhật Ký Sinh Tồn Của Những Người Đàn Ông Ở Nhà Tù
data.overview: MiNhật Ký Sinh Tồn Của Những Người Đàn Ông Ở Nhà Tù (OOPS! I'M IN JAIL) là bộ phim hài công sở nước ngoài được đạo diễn bởi Cao Bỉnh Quyền, người từng đoạt giải Kim Chung của Đài truyền hình Đài Loan chỉ đạo sản xuất. Phim có sự tham gia của Lưu Dĩ Hào (từng tham gia Khi Tình Yêu Gặp Nhà Khoa Học, Khi Phụ Nữ Toả Sáng), Trần Trạch Diệu (từng tham gia Phân Bối Nhân Sinh, Thanh Niên Phú Đô) và Dương Hựu Ninh (từng tham gia Theo Dòng Nước Ngầm, Lưu Kim Tuế Nguyệt). “Người giống như đang bị giam hơn cả phạm nhân chính là chúng ta, những nô lệ của tư bản!”. Ngôi sao Taekwondo tiềm năng A Diệu (do Trần Trạch Diệu thủ vai) phải giải nghệ vì chấn thương, sa vào cờ bạc, và để trả nợ, anh bị thế lực ngầm ép vào làm quản giáo trong nhà tù, chăm sóc ông trùm Cát Oa Oa (Dương Hựu Ninh đóng).

data.biography:
Henry George "Harry" Carey Jr. (May 16, 1921 - December 27, 2012) was an American actor. He appeared in more than ninety films including several John Ford westerns as well as numerous television series. The son of actors Harry Carey Sr. and Olive Carey, he attempted a singing career before beginning his acting career in the John Ford Stock Company. Director John Ford became a close friend and collaborator. Carey appeared in such notable Ford films as 3 Godfathers (1948), She Wore a Yellow Ribbon (1949), The Searchers (1956), and Cheyenne Autumn (1964), some also featuring appearances by his parents. He became a respected character actor like his father.  Carey made four films with director Howard Hawks: Red River (1948), Monkey Business (1952), Gentlemen Prefer Blondes (1953), and Rio Bravo (1959 - scenes cut). He also frequently co-starred with actors John Wayne and Ben Johnson, acting together in nine films each. Between 1955 -1957, Carey appeared as ranch counselor Bill Burnett in the serial Spin and Marty, seen on Walt Disney's Mickey Mouse Club. In the 1960s, Carey appeared on such western series as Have Gun - Will Travel and The Legend of Jesse James.

Later film roles include George Arthur in The Long Riders (1980), Mr. Anderson in Gremlins (1984), aging biker Red in Mask (1985), Joshua Brackett in The Whales of August (1987), saloon old-timer Zeke in Back to the Future Part III (1990), and Marshal Fred White in Tombstone (1993).
data.name: Harry Carey, Jr.

data.biography:
Harry Carey Jr. est le fils d'une star du cinéma muet, Harry Carey, et de l'actrice Olive Carey. Il naît le 16 mai 1921 dans le ranch de ses parents situé à Saugus, un quartier de Santa Clarita, au nord de Los Angeles. Le jeune Carey grandit parmi le bétail et les chevaux1,2. Durant sa jeunesse il espère devenir chanteur1,3. Il est scolarisé dans une école privée d'Hollywood, le Black-Foxe Military Institute. Pendant la Seconde Guerre mondiale, Carey rejoint l'US Navy et sert dans le Pacifique. En 1944, il épouse Marilyn Fix, la fille de l'acteur Paul Fix.

Après la guerre, Harry Carey Jr. entame une carrière cinématographique. John Wayne le recommande à Howard Hawks et Carey obtient un rôle dans La Rivière rouge (Red River), le dernier film dans lequel joue son père Harry Carey Sr. Après la mort de celui-ci, John Ford confie à Harry Carey Jr. des rôles plus importants, notamment dans Le Fils du désert (Three Godfathers). Durant les deux décennies suivantes, il fait partie des acteurs qui apparaissent de façon régulière dans les westerns de John Ford. (source : Wikipédia)

Harry Carey "Dobe" Jr., nascut Henry George Carey, Jr (Saugus, Califòrnia, 16 de maig de 1921 − Santa Barbara, 27 de desembre de 2012), va ser un actor de cinema estatunidenc fill del també actor Harry Carey.

data.biography: Jessica Hecht is an American stage and screen actress and singer, best known for her recurring roles as Susan Bunch on the television show "Friends" and Gretchen Schwartz on "Breaking Bad". She holds an BA in Drama from the Tisch School of the Arts, New York University.

data.biography: 杰西卡·赫克特 （Jessica Hecht） 是美国舞台和银幕女演员和歌手，最出名的是她在电视节目《老友记》中饰演苏珊·邦奇 （Susan Bunch） 和在《绝命毒师》中饰演格雷琴·施瓦茨 （Gretchen Schwartz）。她拥有纽约大学蒂施艺术学院的戏剧学士学位。

data.biography: 傑西卡·赫克特 （Jessica Hecht） 是美國舞台和銀幕女演員和歌手，最出名的是她在電視節目《老友記》中飾演蘇珊·邦奇 （Susan Bunch） 和在《絕命毒師》中飾演格雷琴·施瓦茨 （Gretchen Schwartz）。她擁有紐約大學蒂施藝術學院的戲劇學士學位。

data.biography: June Chadwick (born 30 November 1951) is an English film and television actress. Her best-known television roles are as Lydia in the science fiction TV series V: The Series, and as Lt. Joanna Parisi on the third season of the series Riptide. Her best-known film credit is as Jeanine Pettibone in This Is Spinal Tap (1984).
data.name: June Chadwick

data.biography: 谭俊彦，狄龙之子，1980年7月30日生于香港，能操流利国语，粤语及英语，半流得法，日语，在加拿大完成大学二年级课程，主修广告。2000年签了尔东升旗下的星皓经理人公司，拍的第一部电影为张之亮执导，梅艳芳主演的《慌心假期》。

data.biography: 譚俊彥（Shaun Tam，1980 年 7 月 30 號—）係香港演員，亦係演員狄龍（譚富榮）個仔。佢喺香港出世，祖籍廣東新會，2001 年開始拍電影，2016 年加入無綫電視拍電視劇，包括《天命》、《特技人》及《法證先鋒 IV》等。佢老婆係內地演員任祉妍，有一個女同一個仔。
data.name: 譚俊彥
Lỗ Ban Dị Văn Lục
data.overview: Vào thời Dân quốc, dân chúng còn u mê, mê tín những chuyện quỷ thần hoang đường. Lý Mộc Đôn là thợ mộc giỏi nhất Vụ Thành, tinh thông cổ thư “Lỗ Ban Bí Thuật”. Tương truyền cuốn sách này chia thành hai quyển thượng và hạ: quyển thượng nghiên cứu nghệ thuật làm mộc, còn quyển hạ lại ghi chép những tà thuật kỳ bí khó lường. Vụ Thành bất ngờ xảy ra án cô dâu mất tích, nguyên nhân cái chết quái dị khiến dư luận xôn xao, nhiều người nghi ngờ chính Lý Mộc Đôn đã dùng tà thuật làm điều ác. Để chứng minh sự trong sạch của mình, Lý Mộc Đôn cùng cảnh thám Dương Tông và pháp y Tô Thanh Vân đã điều tra rõ ngọn ngành, cuối cùng phát hiện hung thủ chẳng qua chỉ lợi dụng bí thuật bố trí cơ quan để ngụy tạo hiện tượng thần bí đánh lừa thiên hạ. Ba người phối hợp hết sức ăn ý, liên tiếp phá thành công các vụ án: vụ án trụ sống, vụ án con rối gỗ giết người, vụ án phu xe,... Tất cả các vụ án này đều có mối liên hệ rắc rối với Vu Hàm, sư đệ của Lý Mộc Đôn.

data.biography:
Necar Zadegan is a German born Iranian-American actress and model. She made her Broadway debut alongside Robin Williams in the Pulitzer Prize–nominated production Bengal Tiger at the Baghdad Zoo in 2011. She is known for her role playing First Lady and later President Dalia Hassan on the eighth season of 24.

data.biography: Tom Goodman-Hill is a British stage, film and television actor. He holds a BA in Drama and English with a teaching qualification from the University of Warwick, Coventry, England, UK.
data.name: Tom Goodman-Hill

data.biography:
Tom Goodman-Hill es un actor inglés. Se casó con Kerry Bradley, con quien tiene dos hijos, sin embargo la pareja se divorció en el 2010 después de 20 años juntos.

En el 2010 comenzó a salir con la actriz Jessica Raine,​ la pareja se casó el 1 de septiembre de 2015.

​En el 2002 apareció como invitado en el segundo episodio de la primera temporada de la popular y exitosa serie británica Spooks donde interpretó a Nick Thomas, uno de los contactos del líder derechista Robert Osbourne, que luego se revela que es un periodista independiente llamado Kieran Harvey, cuando Osbourne se entera de esto lo manda matar.

En el 2003 interpretó a Sanderson Reed, el emisario del gobierno británico en la película The League of Extraordinary Gentlemen.

En el 2005 apareció en la obra The Cosmonaut's Last Message To The Woman He Once Loved In The Former Soviet Union donde dio vida a Eric. Ese mismo año se unió al elenco principal de la serie Ideal donde interpretó al oficial de la policía Phil Collins, hasta el final de la serie en el 2011. También apareció en la miniserie Beethoven donde dio vida al músico austríaco Anton Schindler.

En el 2008 interpretó al político inglés John Lilburne en la miniserie The Devil's Whore.

En el 2009 apareció como invitado en la popular y exitosa serie Hustle donde interpretó a Alfie Baron, un hombre de clase alta que se convierte en una de los objetivos del equipo.

En el 2011 se unió al elenco de la primera temporada de la serie Spy, donde interpretó a Philip Quil, el compañero de Judith Elliot (Dolly Wells) y maestro de Marcus Elliot. Durante la segunda temporada el personaje de Philip fue interpretado por el actor Mark Heap.

En el 2013 se unió al elenco principal de la película Mr Selfridge donde interpreta al señor Roger Grove, el jefe del personal,​ hasta ahora.

En el 2015 se unió al elenco de la película Everest donde interpretó a uno de los guía Neal Beidleman de la montaña. Ese mismo año se unió al elenco de la serie Humans donde interpreta a Joseph "Joe" Hawkins, el esposo de Laura Hawkins (Katherine Parkinson), quien compra a la robot Anita para que ayude en el cuidado de su familia.

data.name: トム・グッドマン＝ヒル

data.biography: Hayley Squires (born April 16, 1988) is an English actress and a playwriter. Hayley trained at the Rose Bruford College and graduated in 2010. Hayley is mostly known for Call The Midwife (2012). Hayley is originally from South London.
data.name: Hayley Squires

data.biography: Hayley Squires ist eine englische Schauspielerin und Drehbuchautorin. Hayley wurde am Rose Bruford College ausgebildet und machte 2010 ihren Abschluss. Hayley ist vor allem für die Serie „Call The Midwife“ (2012) bekannt. Hayley stammt ursprünglich aus Süd-London.

data.biography: Sunita Mani (born December 13, 1986) is an American actress, dancer, and comedian most commonly recognized for her gyrations in the viral music video "Turn Down for What" (dir. The Daniels) and as part of the Cocoon Central Dance Team. She also appears in "Don't Think Twice" as Amy, "Mr. Robot" as Trenton, and in the Netflix original series, G.L.O.W as Arthie. Sunita has also guest starred on network television shows including "Broad City" on Comedy Central, Search Party on TBS, and The Good Place on NBC.
data.name: Sunita Mani

data.biography: Sunita Mani es una actriz, bailarina y comediante más comúnmente reconocida por sus giros en el video musical viral 'Turn Down for What' (dir. The Daniels) y como parte del equipo Cocoon Central Dance. También aparece en 'Don't Think Twice' como Amy, 'Mr. Robot' como Trenton, y en la serie original de Netflix, G.L.O.W como Arthie. Sunita también actuó como invitada en programas de televisión de la red, incluyendo 'Broad City' en Comedy Central, Search Party en TBS y The Good Place en NBC.

Sunita Mani é uma atriz, dançarina e comediante mais comumente reconhecida por seus giros no videoclipe viral "Turn Down for What" (dir. The Daniels) e como parte do Cocoon Central Dance Team. Ela também aparece em "Don't Think Twice" como Amy, "Mr. Robot" como Trenton e na série original do Netflix, G.L.O.W como Arthie. Sunita também estrelou programas de televisão como "Broad City" no Comedy Central, Search Party no TBS e The Good Place na NBC.

data.name: สุนิตา มานิ

data.biography:
Lee You-young is a South Korean actress who has won numerous awards for her film roles. Born on December 8, 1989, she made her acting debut in the 2014 film “Late Spring,” for which she became the first Korean to win the Best Actress award at the 14th Milan International Film Festival and also received many other Best New Actress awards. She has since starred in other short films and films. In 2017, she made her small-screen debut in the television drama “Tunnel.” In December 2016, Lee was confirmed to be in a relationship with co-star Kim Joo-hyuk until his death on October 30, 2017 in a traffic collision.  Best New Actress ("The Treacherous") - 2015 (36th) Blue Dragon Film Awards - November 26, 2015

Best New Actress ("Late Spring") - 2015 (52nd) Daejong Film Awards - November 20, 2015
data.name: Lee You-young

data.biography: 李裕英（韩语：이유영，1989年12月8日—），韩国女演员，曾音译为李宥英或李俞英。2014年凭电影《春》出道并在意大利米兰国际电影节上荣获最佳女演员奖，因而备受瞩目。前男友为已故演员金柱赫。
data.name: 李裕英

data.biography: 李裕英（韓語：이유영，1989 年 12 月 8 日—），韓國女演員，曾音譯為李宥英或李俞英。2014 年憑電影《春》出道並在義大利米蘭國際電影節上榮獲最佳女演員獎，因而備受矚目。前男友為已故演員金柱赫。
data.name: 李裕英

data.biography:
Melissa Barrera Martínez (born 4 July 1990) is a Mexican actress, stage actress, singer-songwriter, producer, executive producer and activist. She began her career as the lead characters of Azteca's Mexican telenovelas as the humble and kind village girl Olvido Pérez in Siempre tuya Acapulco (2014) and as struggling hard working woman Mía González in Tanto amor (2015), then joining in as socialite Isabel Cantú in the third season of the Netflix original series Club de Cuervos (2017). Barrera transitioned to Hollywood in 2018, earning recognition playing the sexually liberated and free spirited vegan woman Lyn Hernandez in the Starz comedy-drama series Vida (2018–2020). For playing Sam Carpenter in the slasher films Scream (2022) and Scream VI (2023), as well as leading the horror-comedies as the former millitary nurse and drug addict Joey in Abigail and aspiring breast cancer survivor stage actress Laura Franco in Your Monster (both 2024), she established herself as a scream queen. She is a 3-time Imagen Award nominee, and her accolades include a Satellite Award nomination for playing hairstylist Vanessa Morales in the 2021 movie adaption of Lin-Manuel Miranda’s musical In the Heights.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Melissa Barrera, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Melissa Barrera

data.biography: Melissa Barrera Martínez (nascida em 4 de julho de 1990) é uma atriz mexicana. No México, ela é conhecida por papéis nas novelas Siempre tuya Acapulco (2013), Tanto amor (2015) e na série Netflix Club de Cuervos (2017). Fora do México, ela é conhecida por seus papéis principais na série dramática Starz Vida (2018–2020), no filme musical In the Heights (2021), na série Netflix Keep Breathing (2022) e nos filmes de terror Scream (2022) e Scream VI (2023). Barrera nasceu e cresceu em Monterrey , México . Ela estudou teatro musical na Tisch School of the Arts da New York University .
梅丽莎·巴雷拉（Melissa Barrera），1990年7月4日出生于墨西哥，演员。主要作品有《真我人生》。
data.name: 梅丽莎·巴雷拉

data.biography:
💥Мелисса Баррера Мартинес. Родилась в 1990-ом году в Монтеррее, Мексика. Была единственным ребёнком в семье. Отец работал бизнесменом, а мать была домохозяйкой. Училась в Нью-Йоркской школе искусств Тиш. Работает актрисой и певицей. C 2019-го замужем за музыкантом Пако Зазуэту, детей у пары нет

🏆Главные награды🏆: Номинация на Сатурн (2023) [Крик 6]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Крик» (2022), «Эбигейл» (2024), «Жизнь» (2018), «Копенгагенский тест» (2025)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Мелисса начинала карьеру в мексиканских теленовеллах
data.name: Мелисса Баррера
